content.en:
In front of everyone's eyes, Ye Tian finally challenged an overlimiter.

"It's the Ancient Equatorial Ancestor, the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws actually challenged the Ancient Equatorial Ancestor, and the Ancient Equatorial Ancestor responded to the battle!"

Someone exclaimed.

The Ancient Equatorial Ancestor came from the Dark Sacred Realm Holy Land, one of the Holy Lands of the Dark Sacred Domain, and was also a relatively ancient Returning Realm Half-step Domain Ancestor, it was said that it was to cultivate a holy body, so he had always stayed at the half-step Domain Ancestor level, otherwise with his strength, he would have already impacted the Domain Ancestor.

The Ancient Equatorial Ancestor is only a heavy overlimiter, but it is not the weakest overlimiter, it can be regarded as a middle-to-lower combat power among a heavy overlimiter.

Soon, Ye Tian and Gu Equatorian Ancestor came to power.

The battle between the two over-limiters naturally attracted the attention of a large number of half-step domain ancestors, and even the powerhouses on the one-step list paid attention.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, your talent is indeed very high, the Extreme Dao Inheritor, and you have also cultivated into the Mixed Yuan Holy Body. To be honest, I'm jealous of you, but it's a pity that you haven't grown up far away, and I'm afraid you haven't even practiced a domain technique yet, right? You shouldn't challenge me, this time the gamble is as high as 1 million points, I thank you in advance for giving me 1 million points!"

Gu Equator Ancestor said with a smile.

Domain?

Ye Tian secretly sneered, he really didn't go to cultivate any domain techniques.

The domain technique is a kind of technique practiced by the domain ancestors, and it is actually a forbidden dao technique, but it is the domain ancestors who have transformed the forbidden dao technique and added the understanding of the domain ancestors, so as to transform it into a secret technique that can be inherited.

It is more difficult for half-step domain ancestors to practice domain arts, but as long as they practice domain techniques that are in line with their own path, they will not affect their own path.

After all, when he reached the half-step domain ancestor level of the Returning One Realm, his own path had already been fixed, so it was nothing to cultivate the domain technique.

Once you have practiced the domain technique, your strength will be greatly improved.

Therefore, in the Unified Realm, there is a big gap between the strength of the Domain Technique and the Domain Technique.

Even some of the weaker domain ancestors don't know a domain art.

Therefore, for the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, it is a very face-saving thing to know a domain technique.

However, for Ye Tian, what kind of garbage is that!

He knows how to use holy skills, so he naturally doesn't care about regional techniques!

A person who can only use domain arts, showing off to a person who knows holy skills?

If it weren't for the sake of keeping a low profile, he would really want to hit the ancient equatorial ancestor.

There is no need to refute.

"Then defeat the ancient equatorial ancestor crushingly, anyway, the points earned are enough, enough to exchange for a large number of inheritances and treasures, and leave them to the human race. For me, those points don't mean much!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!

The two fought.

The Ancient Equatorial Ancestor performed his own domain technique - Explosion!

Endless terrifying flames shrouded Ye Tian, as if he wanted to kill Ye Tian with one move.

However, Ye Tian directly exerted the power of the Extreme Dao and erupted into a Dacheng-level Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

After the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was completed, he could disguise any of the three Holy Bodies at the Great Completion level.

The Mixed Yuan Holy Body is complete, and its power is extremely terrifying.

As a result, Ye Tian instantly burst out with a combat power far beyond that of the Ancient Equatorial Ancestor.

Shhh

Ye Tian tore open the endless flames, stabbed with a spear, and directly crushed it with the Dark Pole Spear.

Bang!

Gu Equatorian Ancestor was directly knocked away by a spear, and his whole body was cracked, but he was not killed in seconds.

After all, as an overlimiter, even if his strength is weaker, it is very difficult for the other party to kill him in one move.

Puff puff!!!

Countless spear shadows stabbed in, and each blow was terrifying.

Under Ye Tian's repeated attacks, the ancient equatorial ancestor couldn't stop it at all.

Soon, Gu Equatorian's body was blown up and he was judged to lose.

Fight outside the stage.

The body of the ancient equatorial ancestor condensed, and his face was gloomy.

He didn't expect to lose so quickly, and he didn't have any power to fight back at all.

Ye Tian's strength is fully qualified to impact the first list!

After losing 1 million points, he was a little unhappy in his heart, snorted coldly, and left directly, so as not to continue to lose face.

defeated the ancient equatorial ancestor, and also exposed part of Ye Tian's strength.

Next, almost not many people dared to accept Ye Tian's challenge, and only those whose strength was very close to the overlimit on the list dared to challenge Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian challenged several strong people whose strength was infinitely close to the Guiyi Ranking, and defeated them one by one.

But in this way, except for the powerhouses on the list, no one else dared to challenge Ye Tian.

Moreover, the domain ancestors had no way to enter their layer, so for a while, no one accepted Ye Tian's challenge, and no one dared to challenge Ye Tian.

"No one?"

Ye Tian muttered.

If he wants to quickly improve his ranking, there is only one way, apply to challenge the powerhouses on the list, and wait for them to come to the Battle Boundary Tower, and then challenge them.

Of course, the strong ones on the list can refuse the challenge.

Therefore, it is almost unrealistic for Ye Tian to quickly climb to the top of the Unified List in a short period of time, even if his strength is strong, he can't rise to the top, which is also a flaw of the Battle Realm Tower.

After all, the others are not like Ye Tian, who has improved so much in a short period of time.

Then.

Ye Tian came to one of the Fighting Towers and said, "If anyone challenges me and defeats me, I can give the inheritance of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body to the winner, the inheritance of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body was obtained by accident, not from the Battle Gate, so the Battle Gate has no way to stop me from handing over the inheritance!"

"What, the Mixed Element Sacred Body Inheritance !!!"

Many were shocked.

Although there is almost no way to cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Inheritance, the value of this Holy Body Inheritance is also very great!

It is said that there are not many forces in the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Inheritance, so there are many forces that want to Mix Yuan Holy Body Inheritance.

A Eucharistic inheritance is worth more than even 10 million points.

Moreover, the Eucharistic Inheritance is not something that can be copied casually, so what Ye Tian handed over was not the original, but also an inscribed version, which was very valuable.

And Ye Tiancai is at the level of the One Realm, and there is no way to engrave the Sacred Body Inheritance, it is very likely that it is the original inheritance, and the value is even greater.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, I'm here to challenge you!"

A figure appeared and said loudly.

"The 572nd Crazy Monkey Saint Son on the Ranking List, it's him!"

Someone whispered.

The Crazy Monkey Holy Son is a Holy Son of the Holy Land, and he has cultivated a Golden Monkey Holy Body, and he fights like a mad demon, so he is known as the Crazy Monkey Holy Son.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed to the challenge.

Immediately, the Son of the Mad Monkey entered the fighting platform.

And here in the fighting platform, there are actually a few strong people on the same list, they are extremely pity, and they are definitely one step slower, otherwise if they come to the stage, they should also be able to defeat Ye Tian and obtain the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Inheritance.

However, did they think that Ye Tian was really that stupid?

Without true self-confidence, who would bet on a Eucharistic lineage?
